title: Activation Functions Path
description: Build fluency in Activation Functions inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Advantage Function
steps.summary: Advantage Function belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Activation Functions. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Activation Functions. Compare it with Bent Identity and Event Identity Resolution. It opens into Advantage Actor-Critic and Generalized Advantage Estimation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Bent Identity

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Event Identity Resolution
